steps.name: window mode records the whole window via the proven path; delete crop machinery
steps.description: Replace the bespoke crop lifecycle with the proven getDisplayMedia record/stop/download path using displaySurface:'window'. Delete crop-geometry, crop-compositor, crop-selection, startWindowCroppedRecording and the crop UI. Fixes start+stop+download by reuse.
steps.criteria: window mode start->stop->download works via the reused path; getDisplayMedia uses displaySurface:'window' for window mode and 'browser' for tab; crop modules deleted; build + full suite green.
steps.scenario_name: window mode records the whole window and stops+downloads via the reused getDisplayMedia path (no crop)

validation.review_note: User: record whole window, delete crop code. Supersedes the window-cropped crop machinery.
